Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's dark down there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hear voices from below...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Whoa... Not bad![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I bet this'll be popular![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I go down the stairs and enter...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, we're not open yet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...Hey, aren't you still in high school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're not s'posed to be here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hm... You look like you've been around the block a time or two...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well, I guess it can't hurt... Can you try this new cocktail I whipped up?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, don't worry. There's no alcohol in it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's my own little concoction for customers who can't drink alcohol.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm hoping to expand our clientele, you see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I guess I'll try the non-alcoholic cocktail...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...It's the perfect balance between sweet[n]and sour. It has a refreshing flavor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So, whaddaya think? Good, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right? I knew you'd like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Haha... Maybe it's not for kids.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tell ya what... I'll give ya a bottle of it, on the house.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm gonna go catch some Z's. Come back when you're legal, and I'll let you try the good stuff![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This place is for adults. No kids allowed! It'd take a helluva lot of charm to convince me otherwise![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've been kicked out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} was at least[n]{f 4 31 1 5 1 0}, he might let me in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The bartender keeps staring at me... I wonder[n]if it's because of my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
